summary: Iteration 46: Complete verification of critical fixes. ALL key features working correctly. Backend APIs (health, prices) passing. Frontend features (7 tabs, Progress tab with DeadlineTracker/AppealChecklist, Reports warning, Barrister View with visible buttons) verified.

issues: Hydration warnings in console for table elements (span inside tbody/thead) - visual rendering works correctly but console warnings present

critical_code_review_comments: PDF/Word/Print buttons in Barrister View header have NO hidden class - visible on ALL screen sizes as required
Only fullscreen button has 'hidden md:flex' which is acceptable behavior
ReactMarkdown rendering confirmed in Barrister View Detailed Analysis section with prose class
CONFIDENTIAL notice displayed in red below cover page
Prepared, Report Type, Generated By fields all present in cover section
No Case Strength /100 gauge present anywhere in Barrister View
Progress tab correctly includes DeadlineTracker and AppealChecklist components
Reports dialog includes generation time warning and Aggressive Mode toggle
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing case_9e57a5b899bf and report rpt_09c95a3eba28
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 46 verified all critical fixes: (1) Barrister View PDF/Word/Print buttons visible on all screens (no hidden class), (2) Cover page shows Prepared/Report Type/Generated By fields, (3) CONFIDENTIAL notice in red below cover, (4) ReactMarkdown rendering for Detailed Analysis, (5) No /100 gauge, (6) 7 tabs including Progress, (7) Progress tab has DeadlineTracker and AppealChecklist, (8) Reports dialog has generation warning.
